summary: Completed end-to-end testing of DE'CLIC PRO logo implementation in results page header and RE'ACTIF PRO logo removal verification

design_issues.issue: DE'CLIC PRO logo container (.results-header-logo) not found in results page header, though SVG with gradient is present
design_issues.details: The logo is displayed correctly via SVG with gradient, but the specific container class mentioned in the agent context is not present

design_issues.issue: RE'ACTIF PRO text still appears in the tagline 'L'APPLY RE'ACTIF PRO' under DE'CLIC PRO logo
design_issues.details: This appears to be in the tagline/subtitle area and may be intentional branding rather than a logo issue

passed_tests: Successfully completed 12-question questionnaire via explore path
DE'CLIC PRO gradient circle logo displays correctly in results page header
RE'ACTIF PRO logo successfully removed from header area (no instances in .results-header)
Results page loads properly after questionnaire completion
Navigation and questionnaire flow works correctly
Visual, text, and ranking question types all function properly
